headline: Michael Kayode
body: 🚨🐝 EXCL: Brentford agree new deal for Michael Kayode valid until June 2032! All sealed as Brentford make huge, smart move to keep one of the most wanted RBs around. 21 year old Italian talent did excellent last season + big part of Brentford plans, club sources confirm. ❤️🤍
raw_text:
🚨🐝 EXCL: Brentford agree new deal for Michael Kayode valid until June 2032!

All sealed as Brentford make huge, smart move to keep one of the most wanted RBs around.

21 year old Italian talent did excellent last season + big part of Brentford plans, club sources confirm. ❤️🤍
text:
🚨🐝 EXCL: Brentford agree new deal for Michael Kayode valid until June 2032!

All sealed as Brentford make huge, smart move to keep one of the most wanted RBs around.

21 year old Italian talent did excellent last season + big part of Brentford plans, club sources confirm. ❤️🤍
draft_caption:
📝 CONTRACT- MICHAEL KAYODE SIGNS A NEW DEAL AT BRENTFORD.
